review.1.quote: The sunset in Bali was unforgettable, and the rice terraces in Ubud were breathtaking. TravelVista's recommendations were spot on!
review.1.author: Zhang Ming
review.2.quote: Discovered hidden gems in Kyoto through TravelVista, avoided the crowds, and experienced the most authentic Japanese culture.
review.2.author: Li Wenjing
review.3.quote: The mountains and lakes of Switzerland were stunning! The guides on the website helped us plan a perfect honeymoon trip.
review.3.author: Wang Peng & Chen Ting
destinations.title: Explore Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Discover your next travel destination
destinations.noResult: No matching destinations found. Please adjust your filters.
detail.bali.desc: Bali is Indonesia's most famous travel destination, renowned for its stunning volcanic landscapes, beautiful beaches, exquisite temples, and unique culture. Ubud is the center of art and culture with breathtaking rice terraces; Kuta and Seminyak offer lively surf beaches and nightlife; while Lovina in the north is known for its tranquil black sand beaches and dolphin watching.
detail.bali.attr1.name: Tanah Lot Temple
detail.bali.attr1.desc: An ancient temple perched on a rock in the sea, one of Bali's most iconic landmarks
detail.bali.attr2.name: Tegallalang Rice Terraces
detail.bali.attr2.desc: The most spectacular rice field landscape near Ubud, showcasing Bali's pastoral beauty
detail.bali.attr3.name: Kuta Beach
detail.bali.attr3.desc: Bali's most famous surfing destination with breathtaking sunset views
detail.bali.attr4.name: Sacred Monkey Forest
detail.bali.attr4.desc: A nature reserve in central Ubud where you can interact with hundreds of long-tailed macaques
detail.bali.transport: Fly to Ngurah Rai International Airport
detail.kyoto.desc: Kyoto is one of Japan's most historically rich cities, home to over two thousand shrines and temples. From the golden brilliance of Kinkaku-ji to the serene bamboo groves of Arashiyama, from the geisha culture of Gion to the thousands of vermillion torii gates at Fushimi Inari, Kyoto offers an unparalleled cultural experience. With distinct seasons — cherry blossoms in spring and fiery maples in autumn — every visit reveals a different charm.
detail.kyoto.attr1.name: Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion)
detail.kyoto.attr1.desc: A stunning gold-leaf covered Zen temple reflected perfectly in its mirror pond
detail.kyoto.attr2.name: Fushimi Inari Shrine
detail.kyoto.attr2.desc: Thousands of vermillion torii gates winding up the mountain, Kyoto's most iconic sight
detail.kyoto.attr3.name: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove
detail.kyoto.attr3.desc: Towering bamboo stalks form a mesmerizing pathway, a surreal natural wonder
detail.kyoto.attr4.name: Kiyomizu-dera
detail.kyoto.attr4.desc: A thousand-year-old temple with a spectacular wooden terrace overlooking the Kyoto skyline
detail.kyoto.transport: Shinkansen bullet train to Kyoto Station
detail.santorini.desc: Santorini is the most romantic island in the Aegean Sea, famous for its blue-and-white architecture, dramatic caldera views, and spectacular sunsets. The sunset at Oia is considered one of the most beautiful in the world, while the cliffside path in Fira offers breathtaking seascapes. The island also preserves the ancient Akrotiri ruins, and features unique red and black sand beaches.
detail.santorini.attr1.name: Oia Sunset
detail.santorini.attr1.desc: The world's most famous sunset spot, where blue domes meet golden skies
detail.santorini.attr2.name: Fira Cliffside Walk
detail.santorini.attr2.desc: A stunning walkway along the volcanic caldera with panoramic Aegean Sea views
detail.santorini.attr3.name: Red Beach
detail.santorini.attr3.desc: A unique red sand beach formed by volcanic rock, striking against the turquoise sea
detail.santorini.attr4.name: Akrotiri Archaeological Site
detail.santorini.attr4.desc: An ancient city buried by volcanic ash, often called the 'Pompeii of the Aegean'
detail.santorini.transport: Fly to Santorini Airport or ferry from Athens
detail.paris.desc: Paris is the world capital of art and romance. Along the banks of the Seine stand countless iconic landmarks. From the romantic glow of the Eiffel Tower to the artistic treasures of the Louvre, from the bohemian streets of Montmartre to the luxury shopping on the Champs-Élysées, every corner of Paris exudes its own unique charm. French cuisine, café culture, and the fashion industry make this city a global aspiration.
detail.paris.attr1.name: Eiffel Tower
detail.paris.attr1.desc: Paris's most iconic landmark, offering panoramic views of the entire city from its summit
detail.paris.attr2.name: Louvre Museum
detail.paris.attr2.desc: The world's largest art museum, home to the Mona Lisa and countless masterpieces
detail.paris.attr3.name: Montmartre
detail.paris.attr3.desc: Paris's most romantic hilltop quarter, home to Sacré-Cœur and street artists
detail.paris.attr4.name: Palace of Versailles
detail.paris.attr4.desc: Louis XIV's lavish palace, the pinnacle of Baroque architecture and garden design
detail.paris.transport: Fly to Charles de Gaulle Airport
detail.maldives.desc: The Maldives is a paradise archipelago in the Indian Ocean, comprising over 1,200 coral islands. Famous for crystal-clear waters, pristine white beaches, and luxurious overwater villas, it's one of the world's top diving and snorkeling destinations. Vibrant coral reefs and tropical fish create an underwater wonderland, while ocean sunsets, starlight dinners, and private sandbanks make every moment unforgettably romantic.
detail.maldives.attr1.name: Overwater Villas
detail.maldives.attr1.desc: Luxury villas built over turquoise lagoons with glass floors to watch marine life below
detail.maldives.attr2.name: Coral Reef Snorkeling
detail.maldives.attr2.desc: Colorful coral gardens and tropical fish — a world-class snorkeling experience
detail.maldives.attr3.name: Dolphin Cruise
detail.maldives.attr3.desc: Sail out to watch pods of dolphins leaping and playing in the sunset
detail.maldives.attr4.name: Private Sandbank
detail.maldives.attr4.desc: A secluded white sand island in the middle of the ocean, perfect for a private escape
detail.maldives.transport: Fly to Malé Airport, then seaplane or speedboat
detail.swiss.desc: Switzerland is the crown jewel of the Alps, famous for its snow-capped mountains, pristine lakes, chocolate, and watches. The majestic glaciers of Jungfrau, the mirror-like waters of Lake Lucerne, extreme sports in Interlaken, and the medieval old town of Bern paint unforgettable landscapes. Whether skiing in winter or hiking in summer, Switzerland offers the purest natural experience.
detail.swiss.attr1.name: Jungfrau
detail.swiss.attr1.desc: The 'Top of Europe' — take the cogwheel train to the summit for breathtaking glacier views
detail.swiss.attr2.name: Lake Lucerne
detail.swiss.attr2.desc: One of Switzerland's most beautiful lakes, with the iconic Chapel Bridge on its shores
detail.swiss.attr3.name: Matterhorn
detail.swiss.attr3.desc: The Alps' most famous pyramid-shaped peak, the pride of Zermatt
detail.swiss.attr4.name: Interlaken
detail.swiss.attr4.desc: Adventure capital between two lakes — a hub for paragliding and canyon rafting
detail.swiss.transport: Fly to Zurich or Geneva Airport
detail.newyork.desc: New York is the world's most vibrant metropolis, known as 'The City That Never Sleeps.' From the grandeur of the Statue of Liberty to the urban oasis of Central Park, from the dazzling lights of Broadway to the luxury shopping on Fifth Avenue, New York captivates visitors with its unparalleled cultural diversity and iconic skyline. It's a global hub for finance, art, fashion, and cuisine.
detail.newyork.attr1.name: Statue of Liberty
detail.newyork.attr1.desc: The iconic symbol of freedom standing in New York Harbor, one of America's most famous landmarks
detail.newyork.attr2.name: Central Park
detail.newyork.attr2.desc: An urban oasis in the heart of Manhattan, New York's beloved green retreat
detail.newyork.attr3.name: Times Square
detail.newyork.attr3.desc: The neon-lit crossroads of the world and the heart of the Broadway theater district
detail.newyork.attr4.name: The Metropolitan Museum of Art
detail.newyork.attr4.desc: The largest art museum in the Western Hemisphere, spanning 5,000 years of art
detail.newyork.transport: Fly to JFK or Newark Airport
detail.chengdu.desc: Chengdu is a cultural gem of southwestern China, celebrated for its laid-back lifestyle, authentic Sichuan cuisine, and adorable giant pandas. The leisurely tea houses of Kuanzhai Alley, the folk culture of Jinli Ancient Street, the Three Kingdoms history at Wuhou Shrine, and the modern energy of Chunxi Road blend rich heritage with contemporary vibrancy. Chengdu's hotpot and Sichuan dishes keep food lovers coming back for more.
detail.chengdu.attr1.name: Giant Panda Breeding Base
detail.chengdu.attr1.desc: Get up close with China's national treasure — watch adorable baby pandas play and tumble
detail.chengdu.attr2.name: Kuanzhai Alley
detail.chengdu.attr2.desc: A restored Qing Dynasty street for sipping tea and experiencing old Chengdu life
detail.chengdu.attr3.name: Jinli Ancient Street
detail.chengdu.attr3.desc: A traditional-style street near Wuhou Shrine with folk culture and local snacks
detail.chengdu.attr4.name: Dujiangyan Irrigation System
detail.chengdu.attr4.desc: A 2,000-year-old engineering marvel still irrigating the Chengdu Plain today
detail.chengdu.transport: Fly to Chengdu Tianfu or Shuangliu Airport
detail.machupicchu.desc: Machu Picchu is the lost city of the Andes in Peru, the Inca Empire's greatest architectural achievement. Built on a ridge at 2,430 meters, this stone city is embraced by cloud-wrapped mountains like a city in the sky. Its precision stone masonry, terraced farming systems, and astronomical observatories showcase the Inca civilization's remarkable wisdom. One of the New Seven Wonders of the World, it's South America's most popular destination.
detail.machupicchu.attr1.name: Temple of the Sun
detail.machupicchu.attr1.desc: A precision Inca astronomical building where sunlight passes exactly through the window at winter solstice
detail.machupicchu.attr2.name: Huayna Picchu
detail.machupicchu.attr2.desc: Climb the steep peak for a bird's-eye view of the entire Machu Picchu citadel
detail.machupicchu.attr3.name: Inca Trail
detail.machupicchu.attr3.desc: The classic 4-day trek through cloud forests to reach the Sun Gate above the lost city
detail.machupicchu.attr4.name: Intihuatana Stone
detail.machupicchu.attr4.desc: The Inca's sacred 'Hitching Post of the Sun,' precisely marking solstices and equinoxes
detail.machupicchu.transport: Fly to Cusco, then train to Aguas Calientes
detail.machupicchu.visa: Visa-free for Chinese passport holders (up to 90 days)
detail.capetown.desc: Cape Town sits at the southern tip of Africa and is South Africa's most beautiful city. The iconic Table Mountain rises like a giant flat-topped table above the city, while the wild winds at the Cape of Good Hope tell tales of the Age of Exploration. Cape Town blends European colonial and African indigenous cultures, boasting stunning natural scenery, world-class wine estates, and abundant wildlife.
detail.capetown.attr1.name: Table Mountain
detail.capetown.attr1.desc: Take the cable car to the flat summit for 360-degree views of Cape Town and the Atlantic
detail.capetown.attr2.name: Cape of Good Hope
detail.capetown.attr2.desc: The southwestern tip of Africa where two oceans meet, an iconic natural landmark
detail.capetown.attr3.name: Boulders Beach Penguins
detail.capetown.attr3.desc: Thousands of adorable African penguins waddle along this famous beach
detail.capetown.attr4.name: Stellenbosch Wine Estates
detail.capetown.attr4.desc: South Africa's premier wine region, offering world-class tastings and vineyard tours
detail.capetown.transport: Fly to Cape Town International Airport
detail.greatbarrierreef.desc: The Great Barrier Reef is the world's largest coral reef system, stretching over 2,300 kilometers and the only biological structure visible from space. Home to over 1,500 species of fish, 400 types of coral, and countless marine creatures, it's the ultimate destination for diving and snorkeling enthusiasts. The Whitsunday Islands' Whitehaven Beach is famous for its pure white silica sand, and the Heart Reef is one of nature's most romantic landmarks.
detail.greatbarrierreef.attr1.name: Whitehaven Beach
detail.greatbarrierreef.attr1.desc: A pristine beach of 98% pure silica sand, consistently rated among the world's best
detail.greatbarrierreef.attr2.name: Heart Reef
detail.greatbarrierreef.attr2.desc: A naturally heart-shaped coral formation best viewed by helicopter from above
detail.greatbarrierreef.attr3.name: Outer Reef Diving
detail.greatbarrierreef.attr3.desc: Deep dive at the outer reef to swim with sea turtles, sharks, and vibrant corals
detail.greatbarrierreef.attr4.name: Cairns Aquarium
detail.greatbarrierreef.attr4.desc: The best place to learn about the reef ecosystem and see marine life up close
detail.greatbarrierreef.transport: Fly to Cairns or Hamilton Island
detail.nepal.desc: Nepal is the holy grail for trekking enthusiasts worldwide, home to the most spectacular mountain scenery on Earth. With eight peaks above 8,000 meters including Mount Everest, the world's highest point, Nepal offers legendary trekking routes like the Annapurna Circuit and Everest Base Camp trek. Beyond the mountains, the ancient religious sites of Kathmandu Valley, the lakeside tranquility of Pokhara, and the jungle safaris of Chitwan make Nepal a multi-dimensional travel destination.
detail.nepal.attr1.name: Everest Base Camp
detail.nepal.attr1.desc: The classic trek ending at the foot of the world's highest peak, face to face with Everest
detail.nepal.attr2.name: Annapurna Circuit
detail.nepal.attr2.desc: One of the world's top 10 classic treks, crossing the Thorong La Pass at 5,416 meters
detail.nepal.attr3.name: Pokhara
detail.nepal.attr3.desc: A serene lakeside town where you can paraglide with views of Machapuchare (Fishtail Peak)
detail.nepal.attr4.name: Kathmandu Durbar Square
detail.nepal.attr4.desc: A UNESCO World Heritage Site featuring dozens of exquisite Newari palaces and temples
detail.nepal.visa: Visa on arrival (apply in advance or at airport)
review.bali.1.author: Zhang Ming
review.bali.1.content: The sunset in Bali was unforgettable, and the rice terraces in Ubud were absolutely breathtaking. Highly recommend visiting Tanah Lot at sunset!
review.bali.2.author: Liu Fang
review.bali.2.content: Traveled to Bali solo. Ubud has a rich cultural atmosphere and Kuta's nightlife is vibrant. Prices are very reasonable.
review.bali.3.author: Chen Hao & Wang Meiqi
review.bali.3.content: Chose Bali for our honeymoon — the overwater villa was incredibly romantic! The locals are very friendly and welcoming.
review.kyoto.1.author: Li Wenjing
review.kyoto.1.content: Autumn in Kyoto is absolutely stunning! Kiyomizu-dera and Kinkaku-ji during maple season are like paradise on earth.
review.kyoto.2.author: Zhao Qiang
review.kyoto.2.content: Visited Kyoto during cherry blossom season. The thousand torii gates at Fushimi Inari are nearly empty at dawn — highly recommend going early.
review.santorini.1.author: Zhou Ting
review.santorini.1.content: The sunset in Oia was the most beautiful I've ever seen! Blue domes against the Aegean Sea — every photo looks like a postcard.
review.santorini.2.author: Lin Feng
review.santorini.2.content: The cliffside walk from Fira to Oia is absolutely worth it — stunning views the entire way. Recommend avoiding peak July-August season.
review.paris.1.author: Wang Li
review.paris.1.content: Paris is a must-visit city for everyone! You need at least two full days to explore the Louvre.
review.paris.2.author: Yang Chao
review.paris.2.content: The alleys of Montmartre have such character, and the street artists are incredibly talented. The pastries and coffee are amazing too.
review.paris.3.author: Huang Jing & Zhang Wei
review.paris.3.content: Our honeymoon was in Paris! He proposed under the Eiffel Tower — it was incredibly romantic.
review.maldives.1.author: Chen Ting
review.maldives.1.content: The Maldives is truly paradise on earth! You can see fish swimming through the glass floor of the overwater villa at night — so healing.
review.maldives.2.author: Wu Lei
review.maldives.2.content: Saw giant sea turtles and manta rays while snorkeling — the underwater world was mind-blowing. Worth every penny!
review.swiss.1.author: Wang Peng & Chen Ting
review.swiss.1.content: Jungfrau was spectacular! The cogwheel train ride up was already breathtaking. Switzerland is truly nature's masterpiece.
review.swiss.2.author: Zhang Xue
review.swiss.2.content: Went skiing in Switzerland in winter. Zermatt's slopes were fantastic. The golden sunrise on the Matterhorn is unforgettable.
review.newyork.1.author: Zhao Ming
review.newyork.1.content: Broadway musicals were absolutely amazing! Times Square's energy exceeded all expectations. Recommend getting a 7-day metro pass.
review.newyork.2.author: Sun Fang
review.newyork.2.content: Central Park in spring is gorgeous! The Met and MoMA each need a full day. New York's food scene is incredibly diverse.
review.chengdu.1.author: Ma Li
review.chengdu.1.content: Saw newborn baby pandas — so adorable! The hotpot and skewers were amazing too. Chengdu is perfect for a relaxed lifestyle.
review.chengdu.2.author: Liu Yang
review.chengdu.2.content: Had tea and an ear cleaning in Kuanzhai Alley — experienced authentic old Chengdu life. Dujiangyan is also worth a visit.
review.machupicchu.1.author: Hu Jie
review.machupicchu.1.content: The moment I arrived at Machu Picchu after four days on the Inca Trail, all the hardship was worth it! The city in the clouds was awe-inspiring.
review.machupicchu.2.author: Song Lin
review.machupicchu.2.content: Book Huayna Picchu tickets in advance — the summit view is the best photo spot. Remember to acclimatize to the altitude in Cusco first.
review.capetown.1.author: Zhu Ming
review.capetown.1.content: The views from the Table Mountain cable car were spectacular! It's very windy at the Cape of Good Hope but absolutely worth it.
review.capetown.2.author: He Fang
review.capetown.2.content: The little penguins at Boulders Beach are adorable! Stellenbosch wines offer amazing value — highly recommend a winery tour.
review.greatbarrierreef.1.author: Xu Wei
review.greatbarrierreef.1.content: My first deep dive ever was at the Great Barrier Reef — the colors of the underwater world were mind-blowing! The outer reef is a must.
review.greatbarrierreef.2.author: Zheng Li
review.greatbarrierreef.2.content: Whitehaven Beach sand really is pure white! The helicopter ride to see Heart Reef is romantic but not cheap.
review.nepal.1.author: Feng Qiang
review.nepal.1.content: The Annapurna Circuit is the most beautiful trek I've ever done! The sense of achievement crossing Thorong La Pass is unmatched.
review.nepal.2.author: Qian Li
review.nepal.2.content: Paragliding in Pokhara was thrilling! Flying above Phewa Lake with Machapuchare in view — I'll never forget it.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn about the TravelVista story
about.mission.text: TravelVista is dedicated to providing every travel enthusiast with carefully curated destination information and travel inspiration. We believe travel is not just about reaching a place — it's about discovering yourself and exploring the world.
about.value1.title: Global Vision
about.value1.desc: Covering hundreds of destinations across six continents, from popular spots to hidden gems
about.value2.title: Carefully Curated
about.value2.desc: Every destination is field-tested and deeply experienced to ensure accurate and practical information
about.value3.title: Thoughtful Service
about.value3.desc: Providing personalized travel advice to help you plan every perfect trip
about.contact.text: Have questions or suggestions? Feel free to reach out:

team.member1.title: Founder & CEO
team.member2.name: Li Tansuo
team.member2.title: Content Director
team.member2.bio: Former travel magazine editor, specializing in destination content
team.member3.name: Wang Yuanfang
team.member3.title: Product Manager
team.member3.bio: Dedicated to creating the best travel browsing experience
team.member4.name: Zhao Shijie
team.member4.title: Design Director
team.member4.bio: Presenting the beauty of travel through design
footer.desc: Discover the beauty of the world, starting here
